action_type: A — title/meta/on-page refinement for pos 4-10 keyword
summary: 1) Title tag: 'Digital Marketing Agency Abu Dhabi | 200+ Clients ★ 5.0 Rated' — added social proof. 2) Meta description: rewritten with 3x ROI stat, 200+ clients, and 'free marketing audit' CTA. 3) OG/Twitter: aligned title+description, fixed 4.9→5.0 rating inconsistency. 4) Keywords: added 'Best Digital Marketing Agency Abu Dhabi' and 'Abu Dhabi Digital Marketing Company'. 5) Hero badge: updated to '200+ UAE Businesses | 5.0 ★ Google Rating'. 6) H2 subtitle: changed to service-listing format for keyword relevance. 7) Intro paragraph: rewritten with industry verticals, 200+ stat, and 3x ROI. 8) Stats section: fixed 100+→200+ and 4.9→5.0 to match site-wide claims. 9) Schema: service name aligned to exact keyword 'Digital Marketing Agency Abu Dhabi'.
expected_impact: Stronger SERP snippet drives higher CTR; consistent trust signals (200+, 5.0) reinforce E-E-A-T; keyword-aligned schema improves relevance signal. Target: pos 9 → 5-6.
